import re


def redact(text):
    text = re.sub(
        r"\b([A-Za-z0-9._%+-])([A-Za-z0-9._%+-]*)@([A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,})\b",
        lambda m: f"{m.group(1)}***@{m.group(3)}",
        text,
    )
    text = re.sub(r"\b(Bearer)(\s+)\S+", r"\1\2[REDACTED]", text)
    text = re.sub(
        r"\bsk-[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\b",
        lambda m: "sk-..." + m.group(0)[-4:],
        text,
    )
    text = re.sub(r"(?<!\d)(\d{4})\d{8}(\d{4})(?!\d)", r"\1********\2", text)
    return text
